_comment: InitechOS desktop palette -- LOCKED spec-data (CLAUDE.md Rule 8).
Ref: PRD Sec 10 (asset pipeline: palette/chrome extract cleanly from
the frame), PRD Sec 6.4 (resources/assets), Sec 12 (IP: the frame
is REFERENCE ONLY; we MEASURE it, we do not embed it).
PROVENANCE / HONESTY (Law 1): every color in 'colors' below was SAMPLED
from the reference frame spec/assets/preview.webp (1456x819) at the
recorded (x,y) using a 3x3-average around the point
(tools/palette_extract.c). The frame is a PHOTOGRAPH of a CRT, not a
clean OS screenshot: it is dim, the blacks are lifted and there is a
slight warm/magenta cast. The RGB values here are therefore the *measured*
on-frame values, not idealized System-7 colors -- they are auditable and
reproducible (the test-assets gate re-samples the frame at these (x,y)
and asserts the value still matches within tolerance). Brightness/
white-point correction toward the intended UI colors is a DELIBERATE
later step; v0 records ground truth.
Coordinates are in frame pixels, origin top-left. 'sample' is the
3x3-averaged RGB at (x,y). Keep the names stable (Rule 8).
Regenerate palette.h from this file with tools/palette_extract.c via
'make spec/assets/palette.h' (or the test-assets gate prerequisite).
DESKTOP_BG RENDER FLIP (ADR-0004-AMENDMENT-DEC-09 OD-4-REVOKED / FO-3):
the frame-sampled 'desktop_bg_frame_v0' entry (gray (115,105,108),
recorded in 'colors' so test-assets re-checks it) and the formerly-
canonical SEAFOAM (0x6F,0xA0,0x8E) are BOTH SUPERSEDED by the Initech
Color Canon desktop teal #8DDCDC (141,220,220) = color_canon.json idx2.
The canonical value lives in the 'canonical' section below (ignored by
the frame-resample gate; it is not a frame measurement). palette.h
INITECH_DESKTOP_BG_* now resolves to TEAL; the frame-sampled anchors are
demoted to INITECH_*_FRAME_V0 provenance constants (nothing renders them).
The ONE color authority is flair_canon_rgb (color_canon.h); flair_palette_rgb
is a thin alias. Value oracle: test-color-canon (ADR-0010). OD-4 seafoam is
revocation-history only in color_canon.json's superseded block.

desktop_bg_frame_v0._comment: SUPERSEDED as the live desktop color by the SEAFOAM canon (ADR-0004 OD-4). This entry is the compressed-still frame sample (ground-truth v0, warm neutral gray). Preserved HERE (in 'colors') so test-assets continues to audit the frame-measurement provenance. The canonical desktop_bg is SEAFOAM (0x6F,0xA0,0x8E) in the 'canonical' section. DO NOT DELETE -- provenance record (Law 1).
desktop_bg_frame_v0.role: frame-sampled gray desktop background (upper-right, clear of windows and pie chart) -- v0 ground truth, SUPERSEDED by SEAFOAM canon for the live render

menubar_bg.role: the top Photoshop menu bar fill (blank area right of 'Help')

window_white.role: window/dialog body fill (FILE COPY dialog body, clear of text)

titlebar_pinstripe.role: active title-bar pinstripe band (FILE COPY title bar, left of the title text)

titlebar_ink.role: title-bar ink / dark frame line (DESKTOP window title text band)

text_black.role: body text ink ('Saving tables to disk...' glyph stroke; dim/lifted on the CRT photo)

accent_blue.role: accent blue: the FILE COPY progress bar fill and the pie-chart blue

_comment: Canonical (non-frame-sampled) palette values. NOT iterated by the
test-assets frame-resample gate (which only touches 'colors'). These
are the live render values the OS actually uses, set by ADR/oracle
rather than measured from the compressed still.

desktop_bg.source: spec/assets/color_canon.json idx2 CIDX_DESKTOP (the LOCKED Initech Color Canon, WL-0053) -- the ONE color authority flair_canon_rgb resolves; supersedes the boot SEAFOAM value (REVOKED).
desktop_bg.rationale: ADR-0004-AMENDMENT-DEC-09 OD-4-REVOKED + FO-3: the FLAIR desktop background is Initech teal #8DDCDC (== color_canon.json idx2). OD-4's SEAFOAM (0x6F,0xA0,0x8E) is REVOKED (management decree 2026-06-21, HER-01/HER-06/HER-08) and survives only as revocation-history in color_canon.json's superseded block; the seafoam-relapse VALUE mutant uses it as the RED-must-fire target. INITECH_DESKTOP_BG_RGB now resolves to teal for desktop.c/test_shell. graded_by:authored (P4 honesty; no upstream decomp golden). Value oracle: test-color-canon (ADR-0010).
desktop_bg.role: canonical FLAIR desktop background fill -- the Initech teal #8DDCDC the render paints behind windows

desktop_bg: is the compressed-still ground-truth measurement. It is preserved in
'colors' so test-assets can continue to audit the frame provenance.
The CANONICAL desktop_bg is now Initech teal #8DDCDC (141,220,220) =
color_canon.json idx2 CIDX_DESKTOP. OD-4's SEAFOAM (0x6F,0xA0,0x8E) is
color_canon.json's superseded block; nothing renders it. palette.h
INITECH_DESKTOP_BG_{R,G,B,RGB} now resolve to teal; flair_palette_rgb is a
thin alias to flair_canon_rgb. Value oracle: test-color-canon (ADR-0010).
accent_blue: The single saturated color in the frame; the most reliable anchor.
Used by both the progress bar and the 116%-pie (Appendix A/B).
